title: Cricket’s House on Jaya
description: Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.
scene: Across pages 0, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Usopp, Luffy. Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's not even funny, you heartless bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Oh well, what's done is done, Usopp!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Luffy... Smiff! You really are a...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Whoa, maybe he's like, super duper rich!?

summary: Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.
